summary: Comprehensive testing of Item Mapping Layer for BC Sales Order Line Creation. All backend APIs and frontend UI components are working correctly. 39/39 tests passed including unit tests, API tests, and integration tests.

design_issues.issue: React hydration warning in console: <tr> cannot be a child of <span> in tbody. Dynamic content wrapping causes this warning but functionality works correctly.

passed_tests: Unit tests: 15/15 item_mapping_service tests (normalize, tokenize, score_mapping, map_line_to_item)
Unit tests: 9/9 _resolve_sales_lines tests
API: POST /api/gpi-integration/item-mappings - CRUD create mapping rule
API: GET /api/gpi-integration/item-mappings - returns 3 configured mappings (GLASS001, TIER001, WIDG-A)
API: PUT /api/gpi-integration/item-mappings/{id} - updates mapping successfully
API: DELETE /api/gpi-integration/item-mappings/{id} - deletes mapping successfully
API: POST /api/gpi-integration/sales-orders/preflight/{doc_id} - returns resolved_lines with mapping metadata
Preflight: Widget A mapped to WIDG-A with 98% confidence (exact_phrase method), lineType=Item
Preflight: Widget B unmapped, lineType=Comment with 0% confidence
Preflight: Shows '1 mapped' badge for partial mapping
Preflight: Returns 404 for nonexistent documents
Idempotency: Re-calling from-document returns already_exists=true without duplicating
Idempotency: Preserves lines_added (2/2) info for existing SO 107039
Frontend: Login with admin/admin works correctly
Frontend: BC Sales Order panel visible on Sales_Order type documents
Frontend: CreateBCSalesOrderPanel shows preflight view with mapping columns
Frontend: PreflightView shows SALES LINES (2) table with Type, Description, Item, Qty, Unit Price, Total columns
Frontend: Mapped line shows WIDG-A 98% in green
Frontend: Unmapped line shows 'unmapped' in gray italic
Frontend: '1 mapped' badge visible when some lines have mappings
Frontend: Existing SO display shows BC Sales Order Created with SO 107039, 2/2 lines added
Frontend: Customer override input displayed when customer not mapped
critical_code_review_comments: React hydration warning: Consider wrapping dynamic table rows differently to avoid <span> elements inside <tbody>. Current implementation works but generates console warnings.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All UI components and data-testids verified working)

seed_data_creation: 3 item mappings exist: WIDG-A (widget a), GLASS001 (glassware on skids), TIER001 (tier sheets)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Document 44b2e236-c1ab-4e0e-9c23-23f542d68a71 has 2 lines: Widget A (maps to WIDG-A at 98% confidence) and Widget B (unmapped). Documents b3c5ddaa and 29be78fe have existing SOs for idempotency testing. The confidence threshold is 0.70 (70%). Item mapping uses exact_phrase, phrase_contained, keyword_tokens, and historical_reuse methods. API endpoints: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/gpi-integration/item-mappings for CRUD, POST /api/gpi-integration/sales-orders/preflight/{doc_id} for mapping preview.
